item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
printf 'FULL_INVENTORY\\n'
find \""'$root" -print | sort
printf '"'FILE_INVENTORY\\n'
find \""'$root" -type f -print | sort
actual_files=$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected_files=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
if [ \""'$actual_files" = "$expected_files" ]; then
  printf '"'UNREQUESTED_ARTIFACTS=0 PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'UNREQUESTED_ARTIFACTS=FOUND\\n'
  comm -13 <(printf '%s\\n' \""'$expected_files") <(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$actual_files")
fi
printf '"'STALE_STRATEGY_SCAN\\n'
set +e
rg -n -uu 'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"
stale_strategy_rc=$?
printf '"'stale_strategy_search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$stale_strategy_rc"
printf '"'PLANNING_NOTE_MARKER_SCAN\\n'
rg -n -i -uu '\\b(TODO|TBD|FIXME|draft|stale|superseded|abandoned|planning note)\\b' \""'$root"
planning_rc=$?
printf '"'planning_marker_search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$planning_rc"
if [ "$stale_strategy_rc" -eq 1 ] && [ "$planning_rc" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '"'STALE_PLANNING_NOTES=0 PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'STALE_PLANNING_NOTES=REVIEW_REQUIRED\\n'
fi
exit 0"
